name: apple-m3-max
notes: Apple M3 Max CPU-only (-ngl 0 --device none), Qwen2.5-Coder-3B Q4_K_M, 45s cooldown. Threads->tok/s: 1=10.5, 2=19.7, 4=33.5, 6=42.4, 8=46.8, 12=29.2. Peaks at 8 threads, then 12 threads COLLAPSES to 29.2 (worse than 6). Apple Silicon P/E-core asymmetry (M3 Max = 10 performance + 4 efficiency cores): oversubscribing onto efficiency cores tanks throughput. Sweet spot ~8 threads; never use all 14 logical cores. Sharper penalty than the desktop i7-8700's mild 12-vs-8 dip.
